token.description: Shared-secret bearer token for data endpoints

ticketPattern.description: Optional regex override for ticket-key matching

ticketProjects.description: JIRA project keys that count as tickets (e.g. SALSA)

bindHost.description: Listen interface (default 0.0.0.0 when token set, else 127.0.0.1)

extraConfig.description: Optional extra config.yaml merged after the primary

onClickScript.description: Hook script run when a work-item is launched

sshHost.description: SSH alias for remote editor open (DOCENT_HOST)

directives.description: Optional daemon-local directives appended to config.yaml
